sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, yesterday()), (2, yesterday());
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = yesterday() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE event_date = yesterday();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < yesterday();
